intent: Register a new agent with the fleet, then verify it appears in fleet status

steps.intent: Terminal prompt (server launched silently in the background)
Registration submitted; server responds with agent id
Confirmation line showing registered agent UUID and fingerprint
Status table listing the just-registered agent with hostname demo-laptop
Agent row shows online status and last-heartbeat column
Prompt returned after server is shut down
